subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-03-26 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: Are not men really childish? The life of men is but a few days; then death overtakes them... My home is the home of peace
subcodes.subjects: @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @love and unity, @contention and conflict, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion, @hospitality
